name: Conflicting cover and body metadata
document_text:
Page 1 of 3
Title: Digital Literacy of First-Year University Students
Authors: Ramon Flores and Bea Lim
Draft footer: Old working title was Social Media Habits 2024.
Page 2 of 3
Abstract: This final study evaluates digital literacy using a validated assessment.
Page 3 of 3
Methodology: A stratified sample of 240 first-year students completed the assessment. No DOI was assigned.

expected.title: Digital Literacy of First-Year University Students
